The \boxed{} expression must be the last content in your response.', started_at=datetime.datetime(2026, 5, 2, 18, 22, 39, 37996, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), finished_at=datetime.datetime(2026, 5, 2, 18, 23, 13, 665417, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), initial_observation='Calculate the definite integral:

$$
\int_{0}^{2 \pi} \sin ^{2}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) \cos ^{6}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) d x
$$', initial_info={'experiment_name': 'orz57k-notool', 'task_model_id': 'bedrock/mistral.mistral-7b-instruct-v0:2', 'episode_index': 0}, steps=[TrajectoryStep(step_index=1, action='To calculate this integral, we can use the trigonometric orthogonality relations:

\begin{align*}
\int_{0}^{2 \pi} \sin ^{2}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) \cos ^{6}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) d x
&= \int_{0}^{2 \pi} \frac{1 - \cos\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)}{2} \cdot \cos ^{6}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) d x \\
&= \frac{1}{2} \int_{0}^{2 \pi} \cos ^{6}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) \left(1 + \cos\left(\frac{x}{2}\right)\right) d x \\
&= \frac{1}{2} \left[\int_{0}^{2 \pi} \cos ^{6}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) d x + \int_{0}^{2 \pi} \cos ^{6}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) \cos\left(\frac{x}{2}\right) d x\right] \\
\end{align*}

Now, we can use the following integrals:

\begin{align*}
\int_{0}^{2 \pi} \cos ^{n}(u) d u &= \frac{1}{n} \cdot \frac{2 \pi}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{2} \cdot \ldots \cdot \frac{1}{2} \quad (\text{for } n \text{ even}) \\
&= \frac{\pi}{n / 2} \quad (\text{for } n \text{ even}) \\
\int_{0}^{2 \pi} \cos ^{n}(u) \cos(u) d u &= \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{n-1} \cdot \frac{2 \pi}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{2} \cdot \ldots \cdot \frac{1}{2} \quad (\text{for } n \text{ odd}) \\
&= \frac{\pi}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{n / 2 - 1} \quad (\text{for } n \text{ odd}) \\
\end{align*}

Applying these integrals to our problem:

\begin{align*}
\int_{0}^{2 \pi} \sin ^{2}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) \cos ^{6}\left(\frac{x}{4}\right) d x
&= \frac{1}{2} \left[\frac{\pi}{3} \cdot \frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{2} + \frac{\pi}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{3} \cdot \frac{1}{2}\right] \\
&= \boxed{\frac{\pi}{12}}
\end{align*}', observation='<｜TERMINAL_STATE｜>', reward=0.0, terminated=True, truncated=True, info={'correct': 0}, timestamp=datetime.datetime(2026, 5, 2, 18, 23, 13, 665376, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), tool_calls=[], llm_calls=[LLMCallMetadata(model_id='bedrock/mistral.mistral-7b-instruct-v0:2', prompt_tokens=144, completion_tokens=669, total_tokens=813, token_usage_known=True, cost_usd=0.0001554, cost_type='actual', latency_ms=33849.43421199932, provider='bedrock')])], total_reward=0.0, episode_outcome='failure', num_steps=1, total_tokens=813, known_cost_usd=0.0001554, has_missing_cost_data=False, cost_data_coverage=1.0, total_cost_usd=0.0001554)
